3169960.name: Evil's Maze
3169960.description:
Evil's Maze is a short Singleplayer Horror Game with Escape Room mechanics, story, and an Enemy lurking in the corner. Your mission is to escape from the Enemy, look for items and clues in various locations throughout the game and Escape from the Maze.


You rented a house to get some sleep. It turns out the house is not normal and you have to find a way to escape in order to stay alive.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

Discover the story of the protagonist, who had no choice but to rent accommodation for a night. It turns out that renting an airbmb for a cheap price in the middle of the night was a bad idea.

Your Job Is to Get Out Of This Place Alive.


Dive into the history of the killer haunting the house,
And most importantly, Escape, or get caught in the Evil's Maze

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
3169960.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
